name: happyskills-help
description: HappySkills concierge — explain how HappySkills works, list and install its optional opt-in skills, route any request to the right family skill, sign in, and send feedback. Hands off skill discovery, versions, and changelogs to happyskills-search.

capabilities.summary: explain what HappySkills is and how it works (no CLI command; answered by the concierge)
route a request to the family skill that handles it (no CLI command; the concierge's catch-all)
intents: who do I ask to do X in HappySkills
route me to the right HappySkills skill

capabilities.summary: report a bug, request a feature, or send a compliment about HappySkills
intents: I wish HappySkills could do X
send a compliment to the team

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
